untranslatable_reason: EEDB (Expanding Ending Diagonal Bottom) pattern detection requires multi-bar pattern recognition with diagonal trend analysis and congestion zone identification. This is not available in the allowed indicators list. The pattern requires detecting: (1) expanding diagonal structure over multiple bars, (2) identification of a flat shelf/congestion area near the right bottom, and (3) confirmation of breakout above that shelf. No single price/technical indicator can capture this chart pattern recognition requirement.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using pivot support (s1) for stop placement and price breakout confirmation, but the core EEDB pattern detection and flat shelf identification cannot be mechanically expressed with standard technical indicators. This signal requires visual pattern recognition that should be implemented as a custom pattern detector or machine learning model outside the standard indicator framework.
